user.title: Connect to Episode Response Amplifier
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Episode Response DSP amplifier. The default TCP port is {default_port}. You can find the IP address in your router's DHCP table or in the amplifier's web interface.

data_description.host: The IP address or hostname of your Episode Response amplifier (e.g. 192.168.1.100).
data_description.port: TCP API port (default: 8080). Only change this if you have configured a custom port.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: The credentials for your Episode Response amplifier are no longer valid. Please enter updated credentials.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the amplifier. Please check the IP address, port, and that the amplifier is powered on and connected to your network.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid username or password. Please check your credentials.
error.account_locked: Account is locked due to too many failed login attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
error.default_password: The amplifier is still using the default password. Please change it via the amplifier's web interface first, then try again.
error.invalid_host: Please enter a valid IP address or hostname.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please check the Home Assistant logs for details.

init.title: Episode Response Amplifier Options
init.description: Adjust the polling interval for your amplifier. Lower values give faster updates but use more network bandwidth.

data_description.poll_interval: How often to poll the amplifier for status updates (2–60 seconds). Default: 5 seconds.

set_dsp_preset.name: Set DSP Preset
set_dsp_preset.description: Set the DSP sound preset for a specific zone.

entry_id.name: Config Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID of the amplifier (optional if only one amp is configured).

set_bass.name: Set Bass
set_bass.description: Adjust the bass level for a specific zone.

entry_id.name: Config Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID of the amplifier.

set_treble.name: Set Treble
set_treble.description: Adjust the treble level for a specific zone.

entry_id.name: Config Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID of the amplifier.

set_balance.name: Set Balance
set_balance.description: Adjust the stereo balance for a specific zone.

entry_id.name: Config Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID of the amplifier.

value.name: Value
value.description: Balance (−20 = full left, 0 = center, +20 = full right).

set_input_gain.name: Set Input Gain
set_input_gain.description: Adjust the gain for a specific analog input.

entry_id.name: Config Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID of the amplifier.

set_loudness.name: Set Loudness
set_loudness.description: Enable or disable loudness compensation for a zone.

entry_id.name: Config Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID of the amplifier.

set_delay.name: Set Delay
set_delay.description: Set the audio delay for a specific zone.

entry_id.name: Config Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID of the amplifier.

set_bridge.name: Set Bridge Mode
set_bridge.description: Enable or disable bridge mode for a zone (combines two channels into one mono output at higher power).

entry_id.name: Config Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID of the amplifier.

set_limiter.name: Set Limiter
set_limiter.description: Enable or disable the output limiter for a zone.

entry_id.name: Config Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID of the amplifier.

reboot.name: Reboot Amplifier
reboot.description: Reboot the Episode Response amplifier. The amplifier will be temporarily unavailable.

entry_id.name: Config Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID of the amplifier.

factory_reset.name: Factory Reset
factory_reset.description: Reset the amplifier to factory defaults. WARNING: This cannot be undone. All settings, zone names, and network configuration will be lost.

entry_id.name: Config Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID of the amplifier.

set_amp_name.name: Set Amplifier Name
set_amp_name.description: Change the display name of the amplifier.

entry_id.name: Config Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID of the amplifier.

set_output_name.name: Set Zone Name
set_output_name.description: Change the display name of a specific output zone.

entry_id.name: Config Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID of the amplifier.

set_input_name.name: Set Input Name
set_input_name.description: Change the display name of a specific analog input.

entry_id.name: Config Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID of the amplifier.
